beforeMove.label: Prepare copies of identity documents
beforeMove.description: Keep a simple digital and paper copy pack for first appointments.

beforeMove.label: Confirm visa or residence permit route and timeline
beforeMove.description: Check requirements for your nationality and employment situation.

beforeMove.label: Gather civil records (birth, marriage if relevant)
beforeMove.description: Often needed for registration and family registration.

beforeMove.label: Confirm where you'll register (rental, employer, or temporary address)
beforeMove.description: You need an address to register at the municipality.

beforeMove.label: Plan budget and international transfer approach
beforeMove.description: Consider how you'll move funds and cover first costs.

beforeMove.label: Check if you need to notify authorities in your origin country
beforeMove.description: Some countries require notification or tax registration when leaving.

beforeMove.label: Research schools and registration if moving with children
beforeMove.description: Registration and availability vary by municipality.

beforeMove.label: Prepare CV and key documents for job search
beforeMove.description: Have documents ready for applications and interviews.

beforeMove.label: Obtain employment offer or contract confirmation
beforeMove.description: Often required for permit and registration.

beforeMove.label: Plan long-distance logistics (shipping, flights, first nights)
beforeMove.description: Book and confirm key dates if moving from far away.

afterArrival.label: Register your address at the municipality (gemeente)
afterArrival.description: Usually within a few days of moving in. You'll receive your BSN at registration.

afterArrival.label: Receive and note your BSN
afterArrival.description: Given at registration. Required for work, bank, and healthcare.

afterArrival.label: Open a Dutch bank account
afterArrival.description: Needed for salary and daily payments. Many employers require a local account.

afterArrival.label: Arrange mandatory health insurance
afterArrival.description: Required once you work or live in the Netherlands. Compare options.

afterArrival.label: Get a local SIM or mobile plan
Keep proof of registration and reference numbers in one place
afterArrival.description: You may need them for bank, employer, or insurance.

afterArrival.label: Complete partner registration if applicable
afterArrival.description: Check municipality requirements for household registration.

afterArrival.label: Register children at school
afterArrival.description: Do this as soon as you have an address and BSN.

first90Days.label: Apply for DigiD if you need government services online
first90Days.description: Useful for tax, benefits, and other official portals.

first90Days.label: Complete tax and payroll profile with employer
first90Days.description: Ensure your employer has your BSN and correct details.

first90Days.label: Stabilize long-term housing and utilities
first90Days.description: Move from temporary to permanent if needed; set up contracts.

first90Days.label: Review and finalize insurance (health, contents, liability)
first90Days.description: Ensure you're covered for daily life and rental.

first90Days.label: Close any open registration or permit loops
first90Days.description: Confirm residence and work permit validity and next steps.

first90Days.label: Review recurring expenses and adjust budget
first90Days.description: Track what you're spending and plan ahead.

first90Days.label: Review what's done and what still has a deadline
first90Days.description: Use the First 90 Days guide to stay on track.

first90Days.label: Complete pet registration if you brought pets
first90Days.description: Check local rules for registration or vet requirements.
